sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Sianmang Zeisu naubang kasan man in ah,
Ka ciin leh katuai lai singdang ka tang ta,
Lawmgual itte'n lah lenpih ding hong nial e,
Phamawh kei sawlbang hei taning Topa tawh.
Phamawh kei ee, Singta bang bang lel taleh,
Zion khuapi tual ah limnga bang lam ning,
Lei ah ka gentheihna te ka khamlukhu ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Aw hong lengaw Zeisu vabang hong leng aw,
ka siangah hong khawi aw, holung kum khawm ni,
Nang tawh nunnop a len khop kan a nuam om lo,
Hinpih sihpih dingin nang kongteel zohi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Aw Zion tate mainawt in kalsuan ni,
Eite maiah masa Zeisu mitsuan ni,
Ama dawnsa tuikha mah ih dawn ding a,
Ama totsa lampi mah ih zui ding hi.
